title: LLB Jobs 2026 – CRO, CISO, Assistant Manager and More
org: CRO, CISO, Assistant Manager and More
shortInfo: SMFCL Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 13 vacancies for CRO, CISO, Assistant Manager and More posts. Candidates can apply offline till 18.06.2026 through the official website sdclindia.com.

basic_details.job_title: SMFCL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 13 CRO, CISO, Assistant Manager and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: CRO, CISO, Assistant Manager and More
basic_details.short_information: SMFCL Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 13 vacancies for CRO, CISO, Assistant Manager and More posts. Candidates can apply offline till 18.06.2026 through the official website sdclindia.com.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 63 years Age Relaxation: Up to 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, 10 years for PwBD, as per Govt. of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: CA / ICWAI, CA / ICWAI / LLB / CS / MBA in Finance, B.E./B.Tech in relevant engineering disciplines, MBA or Post Graduate Diploma
qualification.details: Head of Internal Audit (HIA): CA / ICWAI Chief Compliance Officer (CCO): CA / ICWAI / LLB / CS / MBA in Finance Chief Information Security Officer (CISO): Full time Master's or Bachelor's Degree in engineering disciplines preferably Electronics & Telecommunications / Computer Science / Electronics & Electrical / Information Technology / Electronics & Communication or Master's in Computer Application (MCA) with preferred certifications CISSP, CEH, CISA, CISM, CCISO Chief Risk Officer (CRO): CA / ICWAI / MBA in Finance. Certified Banking Compliance Professional by IIBF is preferred Dy. General Manager/E-7 (Finance): CA / CMA Chief Manager/E-6 (Finance): CA / CMA Senior Manager/E-5 (Finance): CA / CMA Assistant Manager/E-2 (Finance): CA / CMA Dy. General Manager/E-7 (Projects): B.E./B.Tech in Civil / Electrical / Electrical & Electronics / Electronics & Communications / Electronics / Mechanical Engg. with min. 60% marks. Desirable: Full Time MBA or Post Graduate Diploma in Management, in Finance or Finance as elective subject Senior Manager/E-5 (Projects): B.E./B.Tech in Civil / Electrical / Electrical & Electronics / Electronics & Communications / Electronics / Mechanical Engg. with min. 60% marks. Desirable: Full Time MBA or Post Graduate Diploma in Management, in Finance or Finance as elective subject Assistant Manager/E-2 (Projects): B.E./B.Tech in Civil / Electrical / Electrical & Electronics / Electronics & Communications / Electronics / Mechanical Engg. with min. 60% marks. Desirable: Full Time MBA or Post Graduate Diploma in Management, in Finance or Finance as elective subject Chief Manager/E-6 (HR): Regular full-time two-year course MBA or Post Graduate Degree/Diploma from Recognized / reputed Institution/University or equivalent with specialization in Personnel Management & Industrial Relations / Human Resource Management or equivalent with first division or equivalent CGPA Assistant Manager/E-2 (HR): Regular full-time two-year course MBA or Post Graduate Degree/Diploma from Recognized / reputed Institution/University or equivalent with specialization in Personnel Management & Industrial Relations / Human Resource Management or equivalent with first division or equivalent CGPA

vacancy_details.Post Name: CRO, CISO, Assistant Manager and More

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sdclindia.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for SMFCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of offline applications for the SMFCL Recruitment 2026 is 18th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in SMFCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies announced for various consultant posts in the Sagarmala Finance Corporation (SMFCL) Recruitment 2026. These positions are spread across different departments and levels.

faq.question: What is the application mode for SMFCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the SMFCL Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: What is the maximum age limit for applying to SMFCL posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under SMFCL Recruitment 2026 is 63 years. However, age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for SMFCL posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary depending on the post. They range from CA/ICWAI, LLB, CS, MBA in Finance, B.E./B.Tech in engineering disciplines, to MBA or Post Graduate Diploma in HR/PM&IR.

faq.question: What is the salary structure for the SMFCL consultant posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the SMFCL consultant posts ranges from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 2,60,000 per month, depending on the specific post and the candidate's experience and qualifications.

faq.question: What is the selection process for SMFCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for SMFCL Recruitment 2026 typically involves shortlisting based on academic qualifications and experience, followed by a personal interview or assessment, and finally document verification.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for SMFCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee for General and OBC category candidates, which is Rs. 1000. SC/ST category candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification for SMFCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for SMFCL Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the official website of Sagarmala Finance Corporation (SMFCL) or through the direct link provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: What is the official website of Sagarmala Finance Corporation (SMFCL)?
faq.answer: The official website of Sagarmala Finance Corporation (SMFCL) is www.sdclindia.com. Candidates can visit this website for more information and to download the application form.

seo_tags: Sagarmala Finance Corporation Head of Internal Audit (HIA)
